projects.title: Sustainability Certifications & Property Values
projects.description: An empirical analysis of how green building certifications (LEED, ENERGY STAR, etc.) affect residential and commercial property values. Using hedonic pricing models and R to isolate the premium — or discount — associated with certified properties.
questions: Do sustainability certifications produce a measurable price premium?
Does the effect vary by market, property type, or certification level?
How has the relationship changed over time as green building has become more common?

tools.name: R
tools.description: Primary analysis language. Using tidyverse, ggplot2, and fixest for econometric modeling.
